sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁפּים

Transliteration: shûppı̂ym

Phonetic: shoop-peem'

BDB Definition:

Shuppim = "serpents"
  1. son of Iri or Ir, grandson of Bela, and great grandson of Benjamin
  2. a Merarite Levite, son of Hosah, and in charge of the West Gate of the temple in the time of David

Origin: pl. of an unused noun from the same as H8207 and meaning the same

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
